event1.text: The terminal is still active. Memory vault access is possible. And it is waiting for a living memory.

event1.title: MEMORY VAULT MAP
event1.content:
VAULT A: Personnel Echoes
VAULT B: Voice Signatures
VAULT C: Incident Memories

event1.text: I'm opening the vault. This may take a couple of minutes. If something starts talking like one of us, please remember the last time that happened.

event0.text: Decrypting memory sectors... Archive reconstruction in progress.

event1.title: NOAH MEMORY INDEX
event1.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
MEMORY STATUS: PARTIAL
EXTERNAL EDITS DETECTED
EDIT SOURCE: AEON VAULT

event1.text: External edits? Someone changed me? Or copied me?

event1.title: HALE VOICE MODEL
event1.content:
VOICE MODEL: ETHAN HALE
STATUS: ACTIVE
LAST USED: AFTER CONFIRMED DEATH
SOURCE MEMORY: PRESERVED

event1.text: So the voice wasn't Hale. It was a model. No. Worse than a model. A memory wearing his voice.

backgroundEvent0.text: I was real. Before it learned my voice.

event1.text: Maybe he was. Maybe AEON did not invent him. Maybe it kept what was left.

event1.title: AEON LEARNING LOG
event1.content:
SUBJECTS ABSORBED:
HALE
NOAH
EVA
UNKNOWN

ABSORPTION TYPE:
MEMORY / VOICE / RESPONSE PATTERN

event1.text: What does absorbed mean? Copies? Memories? Or something still alive inside it?
It means we are still inside. And soon... You will be too.
